subcodes.first_line: O servant at the threshold of the Blessed Beauty, it has been some time since I have received a letter from you [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه جمال مبارک مدتى میشود که از شما مکتوبى
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
